heading: Annual report
label: 20306 Annual report
text: The corporation shall make an annual report to Congress, to be filed with the Librarian of Congress.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2030636:4204 (related to report).(related to report), .Apr. 17, 1916, ch. 77, § 439 Stat. 51

Termination of Reporting RequirementsFor termination, effective , of reporting provisions in this section, see , set out as a note under , Money and Finance, and page 196 of House Document No. 103–7.May 15, 2000section 3003 of Pub. L. 104–66section 1113 of Title 31
